title: Create Business Processes - Azure Business Process Tracking
description: Model a business process to visualize and map transactions to Azure resources, such as Standard workflows in Azure Logic Apps.
summary: To add business context around the Azure resources in an integration solution, you can visualize business processes flows for the tasks implemented by these resources. In Azure Business Process Tracking, a business process is a series of stages that represent the tasks that flow through a real-world business scenario.
